biological_replicate: the objective of this study was to elucidate the molecular mechanisms of IAA degradation at the protein level by a newly isolated strain Pseudomonas sp. LY1.
technical_replicate: Protein samples of strain LY1 cultivated in MSM with IAA (IAA group) and MSM with citrate/NH4Cl (IAACon group), respectively, in two independent experiments were prepared.
experimental_design: the IAA group and the IAACon group could be divided into two groups by the first component.
factor_value: MSM with IAA (IAA group) and MSM with citrate/NH4Cl (IAACon group)
number_of_fractions: A total of 2,604 proteins were identified after filtration in 8 runs of protein samples.
number_of_technical_replicates: The data of one group comes from four samples, two biological replicates and two technical replicates for each biological sample.
number_of_samples: 1 strain described and 8 runs of protein samples.
